subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up from the conference — I'm glad you reached out to get something formal on the calendar.

A 30-minute call next week sounds perfect. Here are a few slots that work on our end:
- Monday, 3:00–3:30 PM UTC
- Tuesday, 10:00–10:30 AM UTC
- Thursday, 2:00–2:30 PM UTC

Let me know which works best for you, or suggest something else if those don't fit.

On your request for the CTO and VP of Engineering's direct contact details — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information externally. That said, once we have the introductory call scheduled, I can make sure the appropriate senior technical stakeholders from our side are looped in directly, so we can set up that parallel senior-level conversation from there.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
